mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class2_user_counter_repair_task(task_id, repair_type, user_id, dedupe_key, status, retry_count, next_retry_time, reason, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{taskId}, #{repairType}, #{userId}, #{dedupeKey}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, #{reason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN 'PENDING' ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.status END, retry_count = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN 0 ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.retry_count END, claim_owner = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN NULL ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.claim_owner END, claimed_at = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN NULL ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.claimed_at END, lease_until = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN NULL ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.lease_until END, next_retry_time = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN VALUES(next_retry_time) ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.next_retry_time END, reason = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN VALUES(reason) ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.reason END, last_error = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN NULL ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.last_error END, update_time = CASE WHEN class2_user_counter_repair_task.status IN ('DONE', 'FAIL') THEN VALUES(update_time) ELSE class2_user_counter_repair_task.update_time END
mapper.select: SELECT task_id FROM class2_user_counter_repair_task WHERE ((status = 'PENDING' AND next_retry_time <= #{now}) OR (status = 'RUNNING' AND lease_until < #{now})) ORDER BY next_retry_time ASC, task_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update:
UPDATE class2_user_counter_repair_task SET status = 'RUNNING', claim_owner = #{owner}, claimed_at = #{now}, lease_until = #{leaseUntil}, update_time = #{now} WHERE task_id IN
#{taskId}

UPDATE class2_user_counter_repair_task SET status = 'PENDING', retry_count = retry_count + 1, claim_owner = NULL, claimed_at = NULL, lease_until = NULL, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, last_error = #{lastError}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND claim_owner = #{owner}
